selection_rule: 仅取每个子任务前3条，不做全量遍历

samples.sentence: a charming and often affecting journey.

samples.sentence1: The company released earnings on Tuesday.
samples.sentence2: Earnings were reported by the company Tuesday.

samples.sentence1: He denied all allegations in court.
samples.sentence2: He admitted every allegation in court.

samples.sentence1: The storm caused delays at the airport.
samples.sentence2: Flights were delayed because of the storm.

samples.premise: A soccer game with multiple males playing.
samples.hypothesis: Some men are playing a sport.

samples.premise: A woman is reading in a cafe.
samples.hypothesis: A woman is sleeping at home.

samples.premise: Children are outdoors building a snowman.
